_comment: By default cherrypick-gex writes its own cache/history under the shared cherrypick home (~/.cherrypick/data/gex) and logs under ~/.cherrypick/logs/gex — omit the path keys to accept those. Standalone: `run.py stream` populates ~/.cherrypick/data/gex/stream_cache.db and `run.py gex`/dashboard read it. To piggyback on a running cherrypick-meic streamer instead, set source.stream_cache_db to MEIC's cache (e.g. "~/.cherrypick/data/meic/stream_cache.db") and do NOT run this module's streamer (it opens the cache read-write).
